description: Charts that help making insights on the most recent events

card.description: Geolocated events plotted on a world map, colored by Goldstein scale (conflict ↔ cooperation).
card.name: Global Event Map

card.description: Time-series of events per hour window, broken down by event root code.
card.name: Event Volume

stages.native:
WITH top_event_codes AS (
  SELECT
    event_root_code,
    event_root_description,
    SUM(event_count) AS event_count
  FROM public_dashboard.event_volume
  WHERE
    window_start >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 day'
  GROUP BY
    event_root_code,
    event_root_description
  ORDER BY
    event_count DESC
  LIMIT 10
)
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('hour', public_dashboard.event_volume.window_start) AS event_hour,
  public_dashboard.event_volume.event_root_description AS event_root_description,
  SUM(public_dashboard.event_volume.event_count) AS sum
FROM public_dashboard.event_volume
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT
    public_lookup.event_root_code.event_root_code AS event_root_code,
    public_lookup.event_root_code.description AS description
  FROM
    public_lookup.event_root_code
) AS "Event Root Code" ON public_dashboard.event_volume.event_root_code = "Event Root Code".event_root_code
WHERE
  public_dashboard.event_volume.event_root_code IN (
    SELECT event_root_code FROM top_event_codes
  )
GROUP BY
  DATE_TRUNC('hour', public_dashboard.event_volume.window_start),
  public_dashboard.event_volume.event_root_description
ORDER BY
  DATE_TRUNC('hour', public_dashboard.event_volume.window_start) ASC,
  public_dashboard.event_volume.event_root_description ASC

card.description: Rolling average of the Goldstein scale by country or region.
card.name: Conflict Trend

stages.native:
WITH top_countries AS (
  SELECT country
  FROM "public"."event_counts_by_country"
  WHERE window_start >= NOW() - (INTERVAL '1 hour' * 10)
    AND country IS NOT NULL
    AND country <> ''
  GROUP BY country
  ORDER BY SUM(event_count) DESC
  LIMIT 10
)
SELECT
  CONCAT(DATE_PART('hour', ct.window_start), ':00') AS event_hour,
  cc.name AS country_name,
  ROUND(CAST(AVG(ct.avg_goldstein) AS NUMERIC), 2) AS avg_goldstein
FROM "public_dashboard"."conflict_trend" AS ct
INNER JOIN "public_lookup"."un_country_code" AS cc ON cc.iso3 = ct.country
INNER JOIN top_countries tc USING (country)
WHERE ct.window_start >= NOW() - (INTERVAL '1 hour' * 10)
GROUP BY 1, 2
ORDER BY 1 ASC, 2 ASC

card.description: Most active actors in the recent news.
card.name: Top Actors

stages.native:
WITH events_last_24h AS (
    SELECT
        actor1_country AS country,
        to_timestamp(date_added::text, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS event_ts
    FROM public.events
    WHERE date_added >= to_char(now() - interval '24 hours', 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS')::bigint
      AND actor1_country IS NOT NULL
      AND actor1_country <> ''
),
top_10_countries AS (
    SELECT country
    FROM events_last_24h
    GROUP BY country
    ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
    LIMIT 10
)
SELECT
	ucc.name AS country_name,
    COUNT(*) AS event_count
FROM events_last_24h AS e
JOIN top_10_countries AS t USING (country)
INNER JOIN public_lookup.un_country_code AS ucc ON ucc.iso3 = e.country
GROUP BY e.country, ucc.name
ORDER BY event_count DESC;

card.description: Regions and Topics where the Recent Media Attention is Focused.
card.name: Media Attention

stages.native:
WITH mentions_last_24h AS (
    SELECT
        m.global_event_id,
        to_timestamp(m.mention_time_date::text, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS mention_ts
    FROM public.mentions AS m
    JOIN public.events AS e USING (global_event_id)
    WHERE m.mention_time_date >= to_char(now() - interval '24 hours', 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS')::bigint
),
top_10_events AS (
    SELECT global_event_id
    FROM mentions_last_24h
    GROUP BY global_event_id
    ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
    LIMIT 10
)
SELECT
    m.global_event_id,
    e.action_geo_name,
    erc.description AS event_description,
    COUNT(*) AS mention_count
FROM mentions_last_24h AS m
JOIN top_10_events AS t USING (global_event_id)
INNER JOIN public.events AS e ON e.global_event_id = m.global_event_id
INNER JOIN public_lookup.event_root_code AS erc ON erc.event_root_code = e.event_root_code
GROUP BY
    m.global_event_id,
    e.action_geo_name,
    erc.description
ORDER BY
    m.global_event_id

card.description: Average tone by person or organization from the GKG data.
card.name: Tone Analysis per Person

stages.native:
WITH gkg_last_24h AS (
    SELECT persons, tone
    FROM public.gkg
    WHERE gkg_date >= to_char(now() - interval '24 hours', 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS')::bigint
      AND persons IS NOT NULL
      AND persons <> ''
      AND tone IS NOT NULL
),
exploded_persons AS (
    SELECT
        trim(person) AS person,
        tone
    FROM gkg_last_24h,
         unnest(string_to_array(persons, ';')) AS person
    WHERE trim(person) <> ''
)
SELECT
    initcap(person) AS person,
    COUNT(*) AS article_count,
    ROUND(AVG(tone)::numeric, 3) AS avg_tone
FROM exploded_persons
GROUP BY person
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 10
ORDER BY article_count DESC
LIMIT 25;

card.description: Average tone by organization from the GKG data.
card.name: Tone Analysis per Organization

stages.native:
WITH gkg_last_24h AS (
    SELECT organizations, tone
    FROM public.gkg
    WHERE gkg_date >= to_char(now() - interval '24 hours', 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS')::bigint
      AND organizations IS NOT NULL
      AND organizations <> ''
      AND tone IS NOT NULL
),
exploded_organizations AS (
    SELECT
        trim(organization) AS organization,
        tone
    FROM gkg_last_24h,
         unnest(string_to_array(organizations, ';')) AS organization
    WHERE trim(organization) <> ''
)
SELECT
    initcap(organization) AS organization,
    COUNT(*) AS article_count,
    ROUND(AVG(tone)::numeric, 3) AS avg_tone
FROM exploded_organizations
GROUP BY organization
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 10
ORDER BY article_count DESC
LIMIT 25;

name: GDELT Analysis
